headline: Bond Yields Are Getting Slashed — These Dividend Stocks Are the Smarter Play Right Now
summary: Bond yields are one option for passive income investors, but they’re definitely not the only possibility. Sure, you can get a yield of around 4% from 10-year U.S. Treasury bonds, but you can probably achieve better returns with dividend-paying stocks. Bear in mind, you can get both share-price gains and dividend payments from some stocks. ... Bond Yields Are Getting Slashed — These Dividend Stocks Are the Smarter Play Right Now
